content:
Pluto in Taurus: Meaning, Traits & Crystals

Pluto in Taurus blends the archetypal drive of Pluto (where you transform, face power and shadow, and regenerate) with the Earth, fixed nature of Taurus.

  • Planet: Pluto — transformation, power, death-rebirth, depth, obsession
  • Sign: Taurus (Earth/Fixed) — stability, sensuality, patience, values, determination

Eastern Perspective
